courtyard_ratio.desc: 内院面积 / 总占地（不宜过小或过大）

height_to_width.desc: 正房高度/面宽（单层或低层为主）

wing_depth_to_court.desc: 厢房进深 / 内院宽度

window_wall_ratio.desc: 面向内院/外街的开窗比例（格扇窗，非幕墙）

aiInstruction: Compositional LlmPlan with explicit COURTYARD/COURTYARD_SPACE at center, north MASS_MAIN hall, east/west MASS_WING, south ENTRANCE gate. skeleton_type=COURTYARD. Output proportion_hints with courtyard_ratio and wing layout. Each wing: ROOF + FACADE_WINDOWS facing the courtyard. Do NOT use a single solid MASS box; enclosure must wrap the courtyard.
